classes.goods_services: On-line marketplace services for buyers and sellers of digital and physical goods; online retail store services featuring digital publications, software templates, and educational content; providing online business referrals among marketplace sellers.

Providing temporary use of non-downloadable software for operating online marketplaces, managing digital product catalogs, processing order workflows, and analytics for creators, freelancers, and service providers.

evidence.proof_of_use_notes: Capture dated screenshots of checkout and paid invoices before filing Statement of Use.
